person.name: Edd Norris
person.headline: I love building solutions, for fun and function.
person.summary: Human-centered software across environment, brands, and education — building technology that puts people first.
person.availability: Seeking Opportunities — Software Leadership, Sustainable Environment Technologies, Creative Technology Solutions

practices.title: Environmental Systems & Technology
practices.summary: CO2T.earth biochar, soil stewardship, carbon reporting, and field operations — software and data infrastructure for sustainability programs.
practices.tagline: Built from Nature. Backed by Science.

practices.title: Games, Interactive Media & Product Storytelling
practices.summary: Game platforms, web experiences, identity systems, and marketing tools built to earn attention and create participation.

timeline.title: EA → Black Lantern → Seamless → Rocket
timeline.summary: Game industry foundation — volunteer QA through gameplay programming and SCRUM product management on slot titles.

timeline.title: Planet's Core, Fish Fight, ERGnomes & PokePocket
timeline.summary: Operational indie studio 2012–2014 shipping Planet's Core, then Fish Fight, ERGnomes, and PokePocket alongside agency contracts. Studio on hold 2014–2018 during teaching jobs and public-service work. Re-established in 2018 as agency-backed software production for Google (via Uncorked), Dell, Washington University, and other clients.

timeline.title: PPS · Innovation Academy · iD Tech
timeline.summary: Teaching and mentoring jobs — special education educator at Portland Public Schools, afterschool club mentor at Innovation Academy PDX, and summer instructor at iD Tech Camps — while 2bit studio operations were on hold (2014–2018) before the agency-backed re-launch.

timeline.title: adidas, agencies, major-brand clients
timeline.summary: adidas Future Team (full-time), then contract engagements via 2bit — Uncorked, Nice Touch, Fresh, Opus, TrustlessTeam, ERGnomes.

timeline.title: OIBW → CO2T VP Operations
timeline.summary: Oregon Institute for a Better Way (2022–2024), then VP Operations at CO2T.earth & CO2True.com (Mar 2024–present). Hands-on architecture, product, brand (Bigfoot mascot), e-commerce, and carbon credit infrastructure.

timeline.title: Cross-disciplinary consulting
timeline.summary: Advisory work on modern and ancient technologies — connecting environmental systems, creative software, legacy infrastructure, and human-centered product practice.

entries.title: 2bit Entertainment
entries.summary: Indie game studio (Planet's Core, Fish Fight, ERGnomes, PokePocket) and software production business (2018–present).
actions: Founded operational indie studio and shipped Planet's Core (2012–2014).
Built Fish Fight (fishFight.app), ERGnomes.io, and PokePocket alongside agency contracts.
Re-established in 2018 as agency-backed software production for Google (via Uncorked), Dell, Washington University, and other clients.
outcomes: Durable public portfolio across games, interactive products, and brand storytelling.

entries.title: Planet's Core
entries.summary: 2bit indie game — operational studio shipping title during founder era.
actions: Founder-led technical design, art integration, and team management.
Shipped indie game as operational studio before 2014 pause.
outcomes: Completed founder-era indie game development at 2bit Entertainment.

entries.title: Fish Fight
entries.summary: Ocean conservation web game from 2bit at fishFight.app.
actions: Creative direction and development for accessible ocean-conservation gameplay.
Web-first delivery with real-world marine stewardship hooks.
outcomes: Live conservation game experience at fishFight.app.

entries.title: ERGnomes
entries.summary: NFT ecosystem technical design for ERGnomes.io via 2bit contracting.
actions: Technical design across art production, front-end, back-end, and Ergo Platform interactions.
Built trustworthy community interactions for decentralized entertainment.
outcomes: Delivered NFT ecosystem technical design on the Ergo Platform.

entries.title: PokePocket
entries.summary: Pocket-format casual game experiments from 2bit Entertainment.
actions: Creative direction and rapid prototyping for accessible pocket-sized play sessions.
Human-centered UX — easy to pick up, satisfying to master.
outcomes: Ongoing pocket-format game experiments in the 2bit studio catalog.

entries.title: Google
entries.summary: Software production client via Uncorked Studios — contract engagement through agency partnership, not direct Google employment.

entries.title: Dell
entries.summary: Interactive and software production client via Nice Touch agency contracting.

entries.title: Washington University
entries.summary: Software production for university programs via Nice Touch agency contracting.

entries.title: CO2T
entries.summary: Founded 2024 — soil additive business, biochar, carbon capture, e-commerce, brand identity, and impact tracking at CO2T.earth and CO2True.com.
actions: VP Operations — software architecture, product design, and brand design (Bigfoot mascot) for Soil Additive Business.
Built industry-leading e-commerce and product sales software from the ground up.
Integrated biochar and carbon capture sales with environmental impact tracking and carbon credit issuance.
outcomes: Delivered integrated platform spanning brand, commerce, traceability, and carbon credits.
Established Bigfoot mascot brand and product UX for CO2T.earth sustainability programs.

entries.title: CO2T Environmental Platform
entries.summary: Software architecture, product design, Bigfoot brand identity, e-commerce, and impact tracking for CO2T.earth and CO2True.com.
actions: Designed Bigfoot mascot and overall brand from scratch.
Built e-commerce and product sales software integrated with environmental impact tracking.
Connected biochar and carbon capture sales to carbon credit issuance infrastructure.
outcomes: Industry-leading commerce and traceability platform for Soil Additive Business.
Unified brand, product UX, and operational systems at CO2T.earth.

entries.title: ERGO.games
entries.summary: An accessible browser-based console for independent web games.
actions: Designed platform strategy and product architecture for a human-centered game hub.
Built Next.js experiences, entitlement models, and catalog systems.
outcomes: Created a scalable foundation for indie web games and interactive entertainment.

entries.title: Carbon Tracking
entries.summary: Traceability, environmental impact tracking, and carbon credit issuance for biochar and carbon capture programs at CO2T.earth and CO2True.com.
actions: Built auditable data pipelines from field operations through product sale to credit issuance.
Integrated carbon capture product sales with CO2T environmental impact tracking system.
outcomes: Delivered reporting and traceability infrastructure supporting carbon credit workflows.

entries.title: adidas Future Team
entries.summary: Interactive developer — consumer experiences, rapid prototyping, hardware research.

resumePresets.label: Software Leadership
resumePresets.description: Technical depth with product and team leadership emphasis.

resumePresets.label: Sustainability Technology
resumePresets.description: Environmental systems, carbon infrastructure, and product leadership.
